items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of waitlisting for sold-out group events, but the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or traces related to this scenario. The expected result was to confirm the behavior or produce a failure report, yet no such validation was documented in the evidence. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the fulfillment of this exploratory step.
